_note_model_role: BACKUP VALUE — model[] is used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role resolves the actual model from model_config.csv. Edit the CSV to change the model, not this field.

qc_settings._note_model_role: BACKUP VALUE — model[] is used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role resolves the actual QC model from model_config.csv.

_note_capability: Capability flag → model mapping is in capability_config.json
